name: Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, and salt in a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Add milk, oil, and vanilla to the dry ingredients; stir until smooth.
3. Combine brown sugar and 1/4 cup cocoa; sprinkle over the batter.
4. Pour boiling water over the batter (do not stir).
5. Bake at 350 degrees for about 40 minutes, or until the cake springs back when touched in the center. Serve warm.
